description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named 'Publish to NuGet.org' that can be triggered manually with an option to publish to nuget.org. The workflow should run on a windows-latest environment with read permissions to repository contents. It should set up NuGet, fetch specific NuGet packages from NuGet.org and an Azure DevOps feed, verify the packages, and conditionally publish them to NuGet.org if enabled.
